task: The plugin page should list the most recent versions first, showing at most 10. Versions are semver strings like "1.9.0". Implement this in version_api.py.
correctness_argument: Parsing each version string into a tuple of integers gives true numeric ordering: `(1, 10, 0) > (1, 9, 0)` as intended. Reversing the sort and capping at 10 returns the 10 most recent versions in descending order regardless of digit count in any component.
